entry.title: Re: Include Description on my Report
entry.content: Please use the buttons "..." and "</>" to make the code easy to read. See here the detailed steps: https://community.sap.com/t5/questions-about-sap-websites/how-to-post-code-in-sap-community-gt-2024/qaq-p/13684774

entry.title: Re: Include Description on my Report
entry.content: Join the table of material group texts.

entry.title: Unlocking the Power of RSUSR_LOCK_USERS Report in SAP
entry.content:
Are you finding it challenging to use EWZ5 for locking and unlocking users during upgrade activities? Have you discovered that this transaction code is now obsolete and are you relying on a custom program? If so, consider using the ABAP program RSUSR_LOCK_USERS.

This program simplifies the user locking and unlocking process, making it an invaluable tool for managing user accounts efficiently during system upgrades.

Understanding RSUSR_LOCK_USERS

RSUSR_LOCK_USERS is a simple yet effective program that is built on top of RSUSR200 program. Here is the list of options available in the program screen:

As highlighted in the picture, the RSUSR_LOCK_USERS report offers the following sections:

 

Section

What it offers?

User Selection

This section offers the following:

User – Selection of specific users.

Group for Authorization – Uses SU01 user group assignments and picks the users based on the group assignment.

Security Policies – Uses the Security Policy assigned to the user in SU01.

Days Since Last Logon – To specify the no.of days since last login (for eg: If you wish to lock the users who haven’t logged-in to the system in the last 90 days, enter the value as 90).

Days Since Password Change – To select users based on last password change.

Selection by Validity of users

Selection by Validity of users can be filtered by today's validity or by a specific period.

Today (current date) – This option will specifically check for valid and invalid users of current date.

  • Users Valid Today – Consider the valid users of current date
  • Users Invalid Today – Consider the Invalid users of current date 

Validity Period – This option will specifically check for valid and invalid users over a specified period of time.

  • Users Valid <From> and <To> - Consider the valid users within the time period specified in the input.
  • Users Not valid <From> and <To> - Consider the Invalid users within the time period specified in the input.

Selection by Locks

This option facilitates filtering users based on their lock status. Below are the lock criteria that can be considered. Selecting one of these options is mandatory (Radio button selection).

  • Differentiation of Locks
  • All users with Administrator or Password Locks
  • Only Users without Locks

Differentiation of Locks

  • User Locks (Administrator) – When the value "Set" is selected, it will include the list of users who have been locked by the administrator, with lock statuses of 32 and 64.

When the value " Not Set" is selected, it will exclude the list of users who have been locked by the administrator, with lock statuses of 32 and 64

 

  • Password Lock (Incorrect Logon) – When the value "Set" is selected, it will include the list of users who have been locked due to incorrect logons with the status of 128 while when the value “Not Set” is selected, it will exclude the list of users who have been locked due to incorrect logons with the status of 128
  • All users with Administrator or Password Locks – It will include all users who meet the condition of being locked by the administrator (with lock status 32 & 64) or having password locks (with lock status 128).
  • Only Users without Locks -  It includes users without any lock status (Active users)

Selection by Login attempts

This section sorts users based on their login attempts to the SAP system. By default, all options are selected, and you can deselect a box to exclude. Alternatively, all boxes can be unchecked if you do not wish to use this option.

 

  • Users with incorrect Logon Attempts – Considers users who have made incorrect logon attempts.
  • Users with no Incorrect Logon Attempts – Considers users who have not made any incorrect logon attempts.
  • User Without Logon Date – Considers the users without any logon date in SU01

Selection by User Type

Selection by User Type filters users based on the user type defined in SU01. For example, you can lock only dialog users based on conditions specified within this program, such as users who have not logged into the system for a specific period of time.

Below are the user types available under this criteria:

  • Dialog Users
  • Communication Users
  • System Users
  • Service Users
  • Reference Users

NOTE: By default, all options are selected, and you can deselect a box to exclude. Alternatively, all boxes can be unchecked if you do not wish to use this option.

Selection by status of password

This section will be considered the users based on the status of the user password.

  • ·Users with Production Password – Productive user
  • Users with Initial Password – Users who have never logged into the SAP system after the initial password was set by the admin.
  • Users with Deactivated Password – Users who password is deactivated  

As selection type “Selection by Login attempts and Selection by User Type”, by default, all options are selected here as well, and you can deselect a box to exclude.

Activity selection

Once all the selection criteria are defined according to your requirements, you can proceed to the Activity selection option to specify your actions. Based on the conditions specified above, the result will now be executable. Below are the actions that can be taken when you execute the program.

  1. Test Selection – Test Selection presents the list of users on the output screen according to the criteria defined before any of the activities listed below are executed.
  2. Lock Users (Local Lock) – To Lock the user locally
  3. Unlock Users (Local Lock) – To unlock the user locally
  4. Set the End of the Validity Period to Today (Only for Valid Users) – Validity of the user will be ended with today’s date
  5. Set the End of the Validity Period to Yesterday (Only for Valid Users) – validity of the user will be ended with the yesterday’s date

As mentioned, RSUSR_LOCK_USERS aids in compliance and audit processes by providing a clear record of user account status and actions taken. This ensures that the organization can demonstrate adherence to security policies and regulations.

How to Use RSUSR_LOCK_USERS?

 

  1. Execute transaction code SA38 or SE38.
  2. Enter “RSUSR_LOCK_USERS” in the program field and execute the report.
  3. Complete the required selections such as specific users, lock/unlock conditions, and date ranges etc.,
  4. Run the program to generate a list of users.

Consider the following condition for ending the validity of users as a reference. I have selected dialog users regardless of their password status—whether it's production, initial, or deactivated—and those who are already locked by the admin or due to password lock. Additionally, I have chosen users without logon data under "Selection by Logon Attempts." Once users meeting the defined criteria are identified, their ID validity should be set to end with yesterday’s date.    

After executing the program, the output will display the User IDs for which changes were made.

Result: According to the given criteria, user validity is ended with yesterday's date. The program was executed on 20.05.2024, so the user validity is set to end on 19.05.2024.

Additionally, the program can be scheduled to run at regular intervals, ensuring that administrators are always aware of any locked user accounts. Automation can help in maintaining continuous oversight without manual intervention.

Steps to schedule the job in the background:

To automate the locking, unlocking, and validity ending of users without manual intervention, you can schedule this job to run in the background. This enables the program to execute automatically at specified intervals, ensuring users are locked or unlocked according to predefined criteria. It's recommended to thoroughly test the program in a non-production environment before scheduling it in a production system to ensure proper functionality and minimize potential disruptions. Follow the below steps to schedule the job in the background:

  1. Execute transaction SE38 and input the program RSUSR_LOCK_USERS, then proceed to execute it.
  2. Define the criteria for locking/unlocking or ending the validity of the user.  
  3. Click "Program" to schedule the job in the background or press F9

     

 

4. Specify the frequency at which the job should run and click Save.

When you have multiple criteria to schedule in the background, specify your criteria and press Ctrl+S to save as a variant as shown below:

After saving the variants, the job can now be scheduled in the background via transaction code SM36.

Conclusion

The RSUSR_LOCK_USERS program is an indispensable tool for SAP administrators, providing critical insights and control over user account management. By effectively utilizing this program, organizations can enhance their security posture, ensure compliance with regulations, and maintain smooth operational workflows. Regular use and prompt action on the findings of the RSUSR_LOCK_USERS report will help in minimizing user access issues and reinforcing overall system security.

entry.title: Re: Two Sales Orders with One Freight Unit
entry.content:
Hi, 

You can deactive the auto creation of FU and use the report 

/SCMTMS/SUBSEQUENT_FUB_LOGINT to create FUs.

entry.title: Re: Two Sales Orders with One Freight Unit
entry.content: More details in SNOTE

entry.title: Re: Two Sales Orders with One Freight Unit
entry.content: More details in SNOTE :

entry.title: Re: Two Sales Orders with One Freight Unit
entry.content: More details in SNOTE : 2877333 - Program for subsequent freight unit building in internal TM component integration There is also an option not to create freight units immediately, but to defer their creation and build them with the /SCMTMS/SUBSEQUENT_FUB_LOGINT report. This way you can consolidate several sales orders or deliveries into a single freight unit.

entry.title: Re: SAP Signavio: SiGNAL Hands-On Guide Pt. 1 - Data Model & Structures

Thanks

Andrew

entry.title: Re: Consumption account cannot be determined
entry.content:
Hello

If you search for this error message, you can find lots of posts with the same error. This one looks relevan:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/consumption-account-cannot-be-determined-ck322/qaq-p/595542

Caetano

entry.title: Re: What’s New in SAP Analytics Cloud Q2 2024
entry.content:
Hello:

We have stories in OVM (Optimizer view mode) using acquired connection and SAP BO UNX as the source. Is the repointing of the model in the Optimizer view stories not supported in this release? 

We also have most of our stories in Classic view mode using acquired connection and SAP BO UNX and with the deprecation of the classic view mode we need the ability to repoint the stories to a different model with the same structure. I dont see this feature being offered in any of the upcoming releases. 

Thank you

entry.title: Re: How to enable automatic transport determination for the RAP BO of a customizing table
entry.content:
Hi @patrick_winkler thanks for sharing bookmarked... 

Thanks-

Abhishek

entry.title: SAP LMD - Route Execution and Release for Settlement
entry.content:
SAP LMD - Last Mile Distribution

Following up to my last blog  SAP LMD/DSD - Last Mile Distribution - SAP Community will get in details in this blog I will focus on Route Execution and Release for Settlement. Execution of Delivery Routes | SAP Help Portal

The Route ID in standard is the same number as the FO number from TM.

Check Out àCustomer Documents àCheck InàPaymentsàDifferencesàLogàComments.

Sequence of the Route can be defined accordingly your requirements:

When we get inside in The Route, we can see the sequence of the process:

In each of those Tab we can see the details of the Goods + Quantities the driver is moving for each customer and of the total are loading in the vehicle.

In the Check Out before the Driver leave the Warehouse the quantities can be adjusts in case is needed and following the Reason Code and Inventory Group.

In this example the Check out has no difference (will make another blog only focus on differences for Check In/Out.

In customer documents we can see the list of the customer will have in this Route.

Here we can see the details of the goods are delivery to this customer, Driver can Add Cash/Check payment, Unplanned Return Package and the date of the customer receive the deliveries.

Driver can also adjust quantities if required.

The next is the Check In back in the Warehouse, where we can see the goods are full delivery with no quantities difference from the goods delivery to customer.

In the Payments tab the Cashier will inform the amount receive from the Driver.

In the Differences we can see “No differences found”, from Product and Payments.

In the Log, part if error happen during the Route execution or settlement will show up.

On comments, you can add any note for further related.

Now the Route is executed and can be Release for Settlement or Settle Now.

Now the Route is release for settlement and Status on Head level is changed to Released.

If we click on Settle Now and the process will run in Background to Settle, the route.

Refer:

Getting Started with Last Mile Distribution | SAP Help Portal

 Thank you and regards!

Rogerio Lima.

entry.title: Re: Audit LMS Administrators

entry.title: Manage BAS Users
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am following the BAS admin help documentation to get the list of users for a particular BAS instance

SAP BAS Export and Download Personal Data from Specific Users 

I am able to get the output JSON in a browser by giving my credentials.

We are using SSO to our Azure AD. I would like to get the list programmatically, can someone help on how I can authenticate in NodeJS for this scenario.

Appreciate the help.

entry.title: Re: Important Notice: Changes in SAP Analytics Cloud Classic Stories & Analytic Applications
entry.content:
Hello:

We have a couple of stories in OVM (Optimizer view mode) using acquired connection and SAP BO UNX as the source. Looks like repointing of the model in the Optimizer view stories is not supported in Q2 release? 

We have most of our stories in Classic view mode using acquired connection and "SAP BO UNX" as the data source, and with the deprecation of the classic view mode we need the ability to repoint the stories to a diffent model with the same structure. I dont see this feature being offered in any of the upcoming releases. 

SAP should offer the existing features availalbe in classic view mode in the OVM before the classic view can be deprecated.

entry.title: Re: SBP installation fails miserably
entry.content: Yes this was the problem. Having 2 schemas sucks and it is more difficult for maintenance and the backup time is longer.

entry.title: Re: MCHB Standard table import zero values in stock columns
entry.content: @cardoso, thank you for the revert. I will look forward to raise the support ticket.

entry.title: Wily Introscope offline no matter what :-(
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

we have a big problem - Wily Introscope is suddenly shown as Offline in step 4 of solman_setup.
I fixed many issues that might have caused this, but now he doesn't have any excuse and still shows offline!

Funny thing is, that with the same settings, it works flawlessly in the Development Solution Manager and we are having the problem in the production system!

Checked a ton of notes - one says to change the port which is nonsense, we have port 6001 and it is fine, I checked the connection with nc. Another note says to update Java for Introscope. But this is totally not clear for me:

1. We do not have the symptom 404 error in IntroscopeEnterpriseManager.log
2. As mentioned - it works perfectly in the development Solution Manager - with exactly the same software
3. Notes 2608940 and 2615293 speaks about replacing Java for Introscope, says that it only supports Java 11 and then gives links to Java 8 ?! Something smells here definitely...

And of course I tried all tricks like restarting Wily, attempting to Discover it again, etc.

Please kindly help us to solve this, as we have 3 systems we have to connect to the Solution Managers. Many thanks!

entry.title: Re: SAP Business ByDesign Localization HCM Personal Admin...
entry.content:
Dear Mate,

I hope this message finds you well.

Currently, there is no functionality to support this requirement. We recommend posting this as an enhancement idea on our Influence platform. This platform is monitored by our Product Management team, and suggestions are considered for future releases of the system.

You can access the Influence forum in the link below: https://influence.sap.com/SAPByDesign

Thank you for your understanding.

Thanks and Regards,

Pavithra

entry.title: Re: Getting error while adding STO based delivery to the...
entry.content: From the screen shot, I could see it is only a warning message which means, system will allow to add the delivery.  Did you try that.  If not, share here what the message number is.

entry.title: Description/Dictionary of ALL the Permissions
entry.content:
Is there a document/resource that will provide detail about all the permissions listed from LMS Admin>System Administration>Security>Role Management?

When clicking on any ROLE ID, the Permissions tab shows which PERMISSION ID the role has. Is there a detail table explaining ALL the permissions in the SF LMS?

entry.title: Re: Getting error while adding STO based delivery to the...
entry.content:
Hi Lakshmipathi,

After getting this message and when clicking the tick icon the shipment screen gets disappeared and the GUI shows the home screen. The message neither have a message code nor have a documentation available. I tried searching on google but no luck. Even the mappings and assignments are done correctly.

This is only happening with the new Sales Org. 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Change Work Agreement Description
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

I hope this message finds you well.

As per the SAP help documentation: Working Time - Configuration Guide | SAP Help Portal, Work Agreements include Permanent and Temporary field values, which are predefined and cannot be modified/changed.

Thank you for your understanding.

Thanks and Regards,

Pavithra

entry.title: Re: define valid tax code
entry.content:
One of reason is that this tax code is not defined for this Enjoy Transaction in T-code OBZT.

Please try to define this tax code for the correspondence transaction in T-code OBZT, and reopen this transaction to check it again.

If you don't define any tax code under T-code OBZT, all tax codes under the country of company code should be available in the drop down list.

entry.title: Re: Employee Workplace Contact Data empty
entry.content:
Dear Manuel,

I hope this message finds you well.

  • Since there are several cases in which organizational changes are meant only as changes in the reporting line unit or manager reallocation, the employee workplace address does not change automatically when changing details in the employee's organization assignment.
  • This is a design decision to avoid incorrect changes in the employee addresses when performing minor organizational changes.

Refer to KBA: 3118957 - Employee Workplace Contact Address Not Updated Automatically Upon Change of Org Unit Address

Please feel free to reach out to us incase of any concerns.

Thanks and Regards,

Pavithra

entry.title: How to translate system effectively ?
entry.content:
How can you effectively translate the system using the text pool? The current process is very time-consuming and doesn't translate all the texts within the work centers. Are there any more efficient methods or tools available for this task?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to translate system effectively ?
entry.content:
Hi ,

Please refer below KBAs and help documents.

Dump During Translation of Text

3327885 - Customer Language Adaptation Tool is Performing Partial Translation of Work Center and Views.

Customer Language Adaptation Tool

Localization Toolkit for SAP Business ByDesign

Thanks

SAP Support

entry.title: Flexible workflow for PR via Purchasing Group.
entry.content:
Dears,

Customer wants to create Flexible Workflow for PR via Purchasing Group, is this applicable on SAP or not?

entry.title: Re: Wholesale and Transmission billing for SAP Utilities
entry.content:
Thanks @kathy_rubens for your clear description, hope you can help with a special situation.

At a distributor we are looking for a solution that does not use DEVICE or DEVICE Info Records. They currently don't have any device in their system and register usage on Installation Facts. Now the want to start using a form of RTP for a special situation.
Question: Do they need a meter or can we use the meter reading values available on a central meter reading portal and import them into the profiles that normally are allocated to the register? If yes, please help and explain how to allocate the profiles and how to configure the rate determination for the RTP since the Rate Type on the register is not available. 

Many Thanks for clarifying.

Best Regards,

Hans

entry.title: Re: Unlocking the Power of RSUSR_LOCK_USERS Report in SAP
entry.content:
Thanks. It's not that EWZ5 is obsolete, its original intent is different from just locking and unlocking users. For that, SU10 or RSUSR_LOCK_USERS should be preferred.

SAP note 3421376 - EWZ5 and EWZ6 are not working in S/4 HANA - SAP for Me excerpt:

Transactions EWZ5 and EWZ6 were developed for the purpose of changing the local currency to the euro. Therefore, they are part of the software component SAP_APPL. Often, user administrators use these transactions even when they are not performing currency changeovers because these transactions have an advantage over transaction SU10 in that they can hold the locked users and automatically suggest unlocking for these users. 

Introduction of the program RSUSR_LOCK_USERS to extend RSUSR200: 1656965 - Locking of inactive users - SAP for Me.

entry.title: Re: How many back end SAP ERP systems can be connected to...
entry.content: Hello, there are no restrictions on the number of connections allowed in test accounts. Happy testing!

entry.title: Re: SAP CodeJam Topics
entry.content:
Hello,

What about an SAP Data Migration CodeJam using Migration Cockpit with:

  • Direct Transfer approach
  • Staging tables/upload files approach

Curious if this topic could be transformed into a CodeJam, as the Migration Cockpit needs ABAP implemented rules to deliver the data as requested. 

Looking forward for feedback!

entry.title: SAP CAP Error - invalid table name: Could not find table/view
entry.content:
Hi experts,

We have a project which is accessing an HDI container outside the space where the cap project is deployed.

We have created the corresponding settings through synonyms to enable the visibility with the externa HDI container.

We have created a view as a select from some of the tables.

service ServicesManagementService {

entity servicesView as ...

Everything gets deployed succesfully and I can see the view successfully created in the HDI container running in the same space as our app and accessing the externa HDI over synonyms. I can even execute the view successfully on Database Explorer.

The problem comes when I run the ODATA call as we receive the error as follows:

Could not find table/view SERVICESMANAGEMENTSERVICE_SERVICESVIEW in schema SDI_HDI_DB_2: line 1 col 436 (at pos 435)

Being the SDI_HDI_DB_2 the namespace where the external HDI is deploy and the namespace used in the CAP project data model cds to define the entities with the cds.persistance exist annotation.

Anything am I missing to make this work?

Many thanks in advance!

M.

entry.title: Integration Framework for Onboarding Compliance Forms From Employee Central
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll integration exists for UK Starter Checklist and Australia Tax File Number (TFN). Does the integration exist for the US W4 form?

entry.title: ZBOR Variant Reports
entry.content: Can a field be added to a report generated in ZBOR to show who made changes to the line? If so, How?

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 Search not bringing up AR Reserve Invoice results
entry.content:
Hi,

Have you checked for the Data Ownership Authorizations for the specific user with which the issue appears?

Can the document be opened by user using the Sales - A/R Module?

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Re: Highlights for Manufacturing in SAP S/4HANA 2020
entry.content: pour le pMRP, pourquoi le besoin en capacité est different que celui sur la CM01 ?

entry.title: Re: hdbsql - inline command to import database
entry.content:
I do not think escape matters (but maybe for the versions of hdbsql?) as I can execute on Mac's terminal following without the issues:

hdbsql -U TECHED_DEMO_VECTOR -j "SELECT "Current_User" FROM \"DUMMY\""

entry.title: HANA Plan Visualizer - See secondary indexes used in a query
entry.content:
Hello. 
I am learning about the S/4 Plan Visualizer.
Doing a test - Creating 2 identical select queries on two identical tables, only difference is that in one of the tables I got a secondary index created, on the other one I do not.

How can I if the secondary index has actually been utilized? 

Thank you.

entry.title: SUM Error - Standalone Enqueue Server
entry.content:
Hi Experts

We are using SUM 2.0 SP19 to upgrade to NetWeaver 7.5 from NW7.31, on a BI/BW system. There is an ABAP stack and JAVA stack on the same server.

We have encountered an error which refers to OSS 2146940, which seems to suggest that we must build a new separate server for the Enqueue service to run on. We are under time pressure, and don't want to have change our SAP landscape at this time. Is there any way to force SUM past this error so we can carry on with the upgrade?

Thanks in advance.

Justin

entry.title: SAP BW – Automated Test Tool
entry.content:
Even simple changes in reporting or planning interfaces could lead to unexpected dependency issues. Testing by the end-user should be the last Option. Below can be found an Automated Test Tool (ATT) using the approach: Test-Fail-Build-Test.

In BW the front-line object is the Query (mostly). APD, OpenHub, … are not considered as the expectation is that BW is used for reporting or planning, not as a EAI system.

This automated test uses the Query run-time interface to fire the Queries in the background and save results into an ADSO.

ADSO is used to process the results with BW tools.

 

The Tool can also be used for:

  • pre-caching of queries. For example: performance boost for the first user after cache invalidation. Queries can be fired with pre-defined selections, so the tool can also be used for pre-caching.
  • monitoring of KPIs. For example: unexpected KPI changes caused by changed processes in the source systems

 

Objects Used:

Object

Description  

Query Executor

Using RSRT functionality to fire the queries in the background

BW Reporting objects 

BW objects to save and evaluate the results

Results Processor

Class with implemented methods to process the results

 

BW Versions: 7.4, 7.5, BW/4 (Expected EndOfLife: 2040)

 

Example how to use the tool: / Tool was used in the following case:

Let’s say we have a Corporate Controlling map of 100+ KPIs with deep dependencies. Requirement is to adjust a couple of the KPIs based on the latest changes in the KPI repository (for example ROCI or NWC). Such Query uses a number of cell-based formulas. We also have dependencies across multiple queries.

Approach would be:

  1. Get the queries currently used by the Corporate Controlling department (usually the number of Queries is rather low, but Queries are complex)
  2. Get a general selection for the queries (ideally a high-level selection to bypass any local accounting specialties). Query-Selections are not in the new Statistics, thus have to be asked for. Alternative is to enhance the Statistics to have the Query-Selections saved as well (not in this article however)
  3. Execute the Queries with the Selections via the Automated Test Tool (Version/Variant-BeforeChange)
  4. Do Implement the changes
  5. Execute the Queries with the Selections via the Automated Test Tool (Version/Variant-AfterChange)
  6. Compare the KF of the two Versions/Variants. All differences must be explained / traced

 

How-To:

First, we need to build the Query Executor. We use the RSRT interface functionality. RSRT interface is a stable interface used in BW/4 as well.

The Query Executor will save all results into ADSO which is consumed via HCPR.

Class specific methods for evaluation. The main evaluation method would be: compare.

 

Code WIP

entry.title: SAP CPQ 2405 release overview
entry.content:
Business Partners Relationship

In CPQ Quote 2.0 Business partners, it will be possible to define relationships between Business partners, and to define nature of this relationship, which can be later used on Involved parties on Quote for simplifying Business partner search and assignment.

CPQ Logic on top of Backend Model 

We are combining the best of the two worlds by bringing in the ability to define sales specific logic in CPQ configurator on top of existing backed models. Customers will be able to hide attributes or even attribute values based on actual business requirements with no custom work, just using visibility restrictions.

Product messages are now officially supported even for products that are synced from back office.

Triggers are not available by default on products that are synced from back office in accordance to note from 2 years ago. If for any reason you need them today please request exception via support ticket.

 

 

 

Support for Pricing Sub-Procedures

We are working tightly on delivering feature parity with S4/HANA and SAP Variant Configuration and Pricing so that our customers can benefit from best pricing practices available today. Quote 2.0 supports integration with stateful pricing where now it will be possible to use even modular pricing procedures. Read more how to use stateful (a.k.a document pricing) in CPQ.

There is a great blog post by @MilanMilenkovic   to read more about modular pricing procedures in S4.

 

Alternative Unit of Measure

Implementation of integrated scenarios just got much simpler as in CPQ Quote 2.0 we now have out of the box support for alternative units of measure that can be used in quoting process. At the same time, we are allowing sales unit of measure to be used in communication with SAP Variant Configuration and Pricing.
In following days I will publish one more post for this feature itself so stay tuned, but for now important is to know that out of the box we provide replication of alternative units of measure through product replication and that unit of measure can be selected in the quote item with no custom effort/columns, etc.

Please do have in mind that all units must have maintained ISO codes.

CPQ Quote 2.0 integration to S/4HANA using only CPQ Models and Pricing 

While we do recommend using our seamless integration with SAP Variant Configuration and Pricing with S4/HANA we did observe that in some cases customer needs are too complex to fit into standard. For those we unlocked an option to leverage mappings done in CPQ Quote 2.0 to generate correct payload when downstream objects are created.

 

System List: New way of bunding in Quote 2.0

In order to ensure smooth migration of Quote 1.0 customers to Quote 2.0 we introduced System List product type to allow bundling where parent item will not be present on the quote. This old/new structure could be understood as a Parent/Child with no parent knowing that items do keep relation and rules between them as they are part of one structure even after being added to a quote. There is nice visual indication on left side of line items to mark items that are part of a System/list.

CPQ Quote 2.0 to S/4HANA Sales Order Private Cloud Integration 

Multilevel configurations with sales relevant subitems (scope items 1YT and 4OC) became possible in S4 sales order pubic cloud integration in 2402 and with this release they are becoming supported when Sales Order is created in S4/HANA cloud, private edition as well. Customers are advised to upgrade integration package SAP CPQ - Quote 2.0 Integration with SAP S/4HANA Sales Order.

There is no limitation in number of nesting levels like in Quote 1.0 integration with ECC.
Known limitation for discounting on sales relevant subitems still remains but will be overcome in next S4 release.

BRIM integration with Multilevel Products

Integration between CPQ Quote 2.0 and S/4HANA Solution Quotation is significantly improved since placing and order with multilevel products is now available. With this, our customers can create complex offers and bundle different product types to support their business and their own customers. Our customers can now bundle products directly in S/4 and Advance Variant and Configuration and use such models of bundles directly in CPQ which is going to speed up the modeling process and shorten time and effort required for it.
You will observe that there is new field on product Order Item Type to support this. 

CPQ Quote 2.0 to DocuSign Integration

If you’d like to keep informed someone on your e-signing process progress and an offer, you can do that now by simply using Carbon Copy enhancement in integration between CPQ Quote 2.0 and DocuSign.

Ever struggled with CPQ emails ending up in spam?

With 2405 release this should be resolved once for all. New and preferred option is "SAP SMTP service (default)" while legacy one is still available. We highly encourage you not to use legacy option as it provenly causes issues in mail delivery. In cases when more freedom is needed in terms of headers and metadata we do support custom SMTP provided by customers. Read more on what is the plan and how to set it up in quite comprehensive help page.

If you would like to go through entire list full What's new is available in new online version (no PDF anymore).

As always we are quite eager to receive feedback from customers and partners after testing new features so please don't hesitate to share yours in comments.

entry.title: Re: SAP Gateway Client error: "CSRF token validation failed"
entry.content:
Could you please explain the meaning of this sentence?

" You have to add the header(‘X-Requested-With’ with a value of ‘X’)  "

entry.title: new alternative for Expot to memory id
entry.content:
Dear community members,

My question is a little basic, but I need if you can please give me the new alternatives to achieve the same thing that could be done before with obsolete transactions EXPORT xxxx TO MEMORY ID yyyy / IMPORT xxx FRPM MEMORY ID yyyy

Thank you in advance for your help, Jaime.

entry.title: Generate Video Presets
entry.content:
Hi

I am creating videos for simulations which have been recorded with the display options scale at 100% which gives a screen resolution of 1920 x 1080.

The video has been generated using the preset of MP4 (Original Size, 1896x962).  

The video is clear when viewed on a laptop but the End Users are saying that it is slightly blurred on their monitors which most of them use.  Their monitors are set to 100% 1920 x 1080.

I have tried the the Full HD and 4K presets but this is worse which the playback very quished and very blurred.  Is there anyway to make the video to be as clear on the monitor as it is on the laptop?

What are the Presets in Generate Video used for?  I cannot find them in them in the Producer manual.

Many thanks.

entry.title: Re: new alternative for Expot to memory id
entry.content: SAP Managed Tags: this question is not about "ABAP Connectivity", it's about "ABAP Development".

entry.title: Re: new alternative for Expot to memory id
entry.content: It's only with ABAP Cloud that it's not supported (https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_cp_index_htm/CLOUD/en-US/index.htm?file=abapexport_data_cluster_medium.htm#!ABAP_ALTERNATIVE_3@3@). It's still valid in classic ABAP (https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_latest_index_htm/latest/en-us/index.htm?file=abapexport_data_cluster.htm).

entry.title: Re: WSAECONNRESET: Connection reset by peer. Multiple use...
entry.content:
Hello Tscott, 

If the error is displayed as a GUI popup error, then the issue is most likely to be at the network layer. 

If the GUI disappears without any popup and the logs show connections being lost, then the GUI is most likely the issue. 

Let us know which scenario you are facing.

entry.title: Partner number issue in IDOC - sending and receiving in same system
entry.content:
Dear all,

I created new partner number in logical system (Tcode- SALE) as well as new port in WE21. 

I am sending a IDOC within same system. In this process, Outbound IDOC is successful with correct partner number but the inbound IDOC don't have the partner number that I created. IDOC getting created with standard partner number with error Partner profile does not exist.

Partner profile added under Logical system in newly created partner number with correct process code.

#IDOC

entry.title: Re: MDK Mobile Application - How to keep variables between synchronizations
entry.content: Sorry, totally my mistake. Application data are not changed by synchronization. In my case, synchronization triggers redraw multiple times, and redraw calls my functions and that function overwrites my data.

entry.title: Re: WSAECONNRESET: Connection reset by peer. Multiple use...
entry.content: Thanks a lot for the reply. The GUI displays the error..

entry.title: Re: ABAP RAP error " Handler not implemented; Method: INSTANCE_FEATURE "
entry.content: Did you find a solution for this? I am getting similar error and only in our DEV environment. Sandbox system works fine.

entry.title: If sfc already completed, want to log NC stand alone NC log, do we need to update sfc again ?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

If sfc already completed, want to log an NC  using stand alone NC log,  then the sfc should be done again ?

Thanks,

Venkata

entry.title: Re: How to Enable Multiple Selection Mode in a Data Table...
entry.content: While Data Table does not support multiple selection you could simulate it by using a image column and an unselected and selected image to let the user know what is currently selected.  You would need to add rules to return the correct image to show along with a rule to toggle the selected state saving the item somewhere when pressed (one place could be client data on the page).  The one downside is you will need to redraw the while data table when a selection is made which isn't ideal but would provide you the desired functionality.

entry.title: Re: MRP Managed materials supplied by another plant
entry.content:
SAP MRP. I have a regulating centre (it does not sell), which proportionally distributes quantities to the rest of the centres or delegations according to the needs of each centre.
How can I do this process in SAP MRP?

Thank you for your kindness

entry.title: Re: How to clear the old assets value without depreciation
entry.content:
Hi RajPal,

 

Before trying to provide some alternatives to try to help I would like to share a few things:

  • First of all, the info that I will share it’s based on the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (Public Cloud) product (which is the focus of this specific community). Please consider that if you’re using a different product the info I’ll share might not apply.
  • Based on what you’re describing I’m assuming that the customer uploaded old assets during or after the implementation (please consider that Public Cloud was released around 2017) and then they didn’t use the Fixed Assets functionality

 

That said, I would suggest the following:

  • Go to the “Make Company Code Settings” App and review the specific settings for the relevant Company Code(s). Please refer to key screenshots below taken from an internal SAP test system.
  • In general, it’s always recommended to use the current year to perform the financial adjustments so previous years are not impacted
  • Once you have done the relevant settings to record the assets retirement you can scrap them or sell them with or without revenue. The specific steps are described in the scope item Asset Accounting (J62) - US 

 

I hope this helps.

 

Ernesto Cepeda

Make Company Code Settings - Asset Accounting Specific

entry.title: Re: MRP Managed materials supplied by another plant
entry.content:
SAP MRP. I have a regulating centre (it does not sell), which proportionally distributes quantities to the rest of the centres or delegations according to the needs of each centre.
Each plant runs its own MRP, but if the requirement does not reach a percentage of the lot size, the rest of the requirement is provided by the regulating plant.
The buffer plant procures proportionally equally to the rest of the plants, when they do not reach the next lot size. Example: Lot size 50, requirement of 7, as it does not reach a set percentage, those 7 are supplied by the buffer plant, and so on in the rest of the plants.
How can I do this process in SAP MRP?

Thank you for your kindness

Thank you for your kindness

entry.title: Re: Some issues with the SuccessFactors Microsoft Teams i...
entry.content: Hello @jsysel, if you click supported commands for quick actions or learn more, it will take you to a help.sap guide which lists all available actions and configuration options. Our end users shouldn't see these guides or they are going to get confused. Not only will it suggest actions that they cannot use, but it will show potential functionality that we dont' yet have set up. Like your screenprint, the actions listed out are specific to our instance, but since there are two hyperlinks to an external guide that lists all the actions, it is still confusing

entry.title: Re: Some issues with the SuccessFactors Microsoft Teams i...
entry.content: Hi, I understand, I think this is more for influence portal than anything else. As this enhancement needs to be implemented by SAP into the teams app.

entry.title: Unable to see the negative values for the Reversed Material
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Greetings of the day!!

In the application "Material document Overview", all the postings of materials are in positive values which may be goods receipts, goods postings and goods reversals. 

Receipts of goods, good issues and Reversals can be identified only by the movement type. There is no identification of negative sign for reversals as there is a identification in MB51 in ECC version.

Are there any hidden settings to turn on the signs for the quantity's that are reversed (means for 262 movements) if not please help with the suitable application which has signs for the Reversed material.

 

Regards,

Yaswanth. 

MM Purchasing 

MM Inventory Management

entry.title: What is the best choice for integration?
entry.content:
I have a scenario where the customer has either SAP B1 or else SAP S4HANA backend systems. The requirement is to somehow extract data from these systems so that they can be used in 3rd party reporting tools. For example, an automated job will run nightly for the transaction mb51(materials management) transaction. This report(or at least the data from the report) needs to be integrated to 3rd party reporting tools like, for example, Power BI. Which of the following options would best help me achieve this -

  1. SAP PO

  2. SAP CPI

  3. ODBC Connectors

  4. DVW

  5. Some other tool...?

Thanks,

Atul Prabhudesai

I think the JavaScript is where I'm missed out. What is the output for it (the JavaScript)? I'm aware of the input is coming from data variable (ObjectLists) but not quite sure for the output. Currently my output is the default one (result with text property)

Best regards,
Isyraf

entry.title: Re: Getting error while adding STO based delivery to the...
entry.content: As I already asked, please share the warning message number.

entry.title: Re: Buttons in custom column of list report fiori elements
entry.content: You can defined a expression binding or model to the visible property of the Button, Ideally it should work. Also, If you can tell us more about the logic, based on which you want to enable/disable the button.

entry.title: Re: Joining us from the AppGyver Forum? Start here in the SAP Builders Group!
entry.content:
Hi @EsmeeX, I'm very glad to hear that. I'm actually interested in all Appgyver forum content as you could find almost all answers and solutions on it. If you warned community it's going to be removed i would happily map and download all it's content.

Can you tell whats the time frame its going to be available online again?

Is it possible you could share a link to the content of it so we could download it before it's back online again?

Thank you for all your effort.

Kind Regards

Mike

entry.title: Re: Customizing Material Master – Adding new tab/sub-screen in MM01 / MM02 / MM03

Hello  Everyone

I followed all the steps and created the sub-screen.

When I add a text, it saves the text to the text object of the screen I copied. Am I missing a step?
I want to assign it to a custom text object I just created. Is there an customization or any solution for this, how can I solve it?

Thanks in advance,

Hasan

entry.title: how to fix The import org.owasp cannot be resolved"
entry.content: how to fix "The import org.owasp cannot be resolved" while importing "<%@ page import="org.owasp.esapi.ESAPI" in NWDS - jsp file

entry.title: Copy inspection results option is disable mode
entry.content:
I am trying to copy inspection results from one lot to another lot during the inspection lot processing, but the 'Copy Inspection Results' option is disabled.

Can you please let me know how to enable it?

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Copy inspection results option is disable mode
entry.content: Please check the online resource Copy Inspection Results and section Prerequisites for how to enable the functionality in S/4HANA Cloud

entry.title: Re: Maintain the fields on the correspondence form
entry.content:
Hi JessJSilaen,

As you noted, that function WordNum is designed by Adobe to only convert to English (https://help.adobe.com/en_US/AEMForms/6.1/DesignerFormCalcRef/WS92d06802c76abadb-32254d55129f5ee7c98-7f95.2.html)

"Returns the English text equivalent of a given number."

If you look in the FormCalc reference, only English is supported 

"As of this release, it is not possible to specify a locale identifier other than English for this function"

It's not an uncommon ask, there are several looking for the same thing since at least 2010... there is even a SAP knowledge base article on it

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3380539

 

Have you considered to code it yourself in FormCalc or Javascript? (i had to once do a bubble sort for a table in a similar manner)

Similar to what they did here (sorry for the external link), see the Self Impementation: https://ourcodeworld.com/articles/read/353/how-to-convert-numbers-to-words-number-spelling-in-javascript#google_vignette

which draws on this example: https://stackoverflow.com/questions/14766951/transform-numbers-to-words-in-lakh-crore-system

The only other option is maybe define a custom field and use developer extensibility or side-by-side extensibility to update the custom field and pass it to the form.

Thank you

Jerry

entry.title: Re: SQL workbench (history)
entry.content:
Jim,

Under Administrator>Tools>Workbench History, you will find the history of all queries (not just yours).

https://help.sap.com/docs/APM_ICM/d7c8dbefd0e64d75bdc6bf2a2e86b8e7/7884c84cbd944482ae8aa3287af6a84e.html

entry.title: Re: Problem when run command fiori add deploy-config

  • 124 - ER CHILD CARE CONTRIBUTION

Thanks,

Kim

entry.title: SAP Crystal Reports for Eclipse
entry.content:
Hi,

What is the latest version of SAP crystal reports for eclipse?

Please share the SAP support duration for the same.

SAP Crystal Reports, version for Eclipse 

 

Thanks...

entry.title: SAP RAP - Trigger determination on save without field changes
entry.content:
Hi,

I've a RAP-based app - Managed, Draft enabled.

I've a determination at the parent entity level

determination updateInvoice on save { create; update; }

So I expect the determination to trigger on save whenever I hit save in the edit mode. The problem is the determination only triggers if I update/change the value of at least one field before hitting save.

I would like to have the determination trigger on save irrespective of whether I update any fields or not. How can I achieve that? Is there a way I can insert a dummy entity update somewhere after the user hits save to force-trigger the determination?

Regards,

Saurabh

entry.title: SAP Crystal reports for Eclipse - support
entry.content:
Hi,

We are using SAP crystal reports for eclipse jars of version 12.2.231.5147.

Till when these jars are supported?

 

Thanks,

 

(https://origin-az.softwaredownloads.sap.com/public/file/0020000001532392023)

entry.title: Re: BCM XML payment file not generated in BNK_MONIP
entry.content:
Please check your workflow settings.

check that the following entries are maintained in SM30 with view V_TBCA_RTW_LINK:
BNK_COM 01 50100024 50100021
BNK_COM 02 50100024 50100022
BNK_COM 03 50100024 50100023
BNK_INI 01 50100024 31000004

Also check if there is any error message in SWI2_DIAG.

entry.title: How to import data via Integration Center that has commas
entry.content:
Hi - 

I am trying to update Requisition data via Integration Center but am running into an issue with commas in my CSV file. When I upload a sample CSV file to the IC job, the data 'breaks' where there is a comma in the values and everything shifts to a new column. The data in my CSV file does have double quotes around the values that have commas, but IC doesn't seem to respect these double quote and 'breaks' the data wherever a comma is present. Is it possible to have valid commas in the data of your input file? If so, how can I get this to work?

 

Thanks

entry.title: How to renew the Subaccount certificate in SAP Cloud Connector?
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

SAP Cloud Connector Certificate of our subaccount will expire. It needs to be renewed.
Could you please help to renew it?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to renew the Subaccount certificate in SAP Cloud...
entry.content:
Hello,

This is Vinícius from SAP BTP support team.

My understanding is that:
You want steps on how to renew the subaccount certificate in SAP Cloud Connector.

--Research--

  • Search Terms: SCC Refresh subaccount
    • 2950537 - Subaccount certificate expired from SAP Cloud Connector
    • 2932205 - Unable to refresh Neo subaccount certificate on Cloud Connector

--Solution--

You need to refresh the subaccount as described in 2950537 - Subaccount certificate expired from SAP Cloud Connector

If you face any issues, then carefully review 2932205 - Unable to refresh Neo subaccount certificate on Cloud Connector

If issue still persists, open a case in BC-MID-SCC team and provide:

  1. SCC logs
  2. Screenshot from the error message
  3. The User you are using for this
  4. The outcomes from checking the KBA

Wishing you a pleasant week!😉
Vini
SAP Support
BTP Integrations & Foundation Services | BTP Foundation Technologies

entry.title: Integrate an SAPUI5 App to SAP Build Work Zone
entry.content:
Hey all.

I was checking the content from tutorial "Integrate an SAPUI5 App to SAP Build Work Zone" and I have a question: Is it possible to use this approach to import and maintain all kinds of SAPUI5 apps? Even those created from my S4H on-premise system?

Best Regards,
Mauricio

entry.title: Re: APM/APMe Security groups details
entry.content: Hi, K.A., Let me do some digging around and see what I can come up with to help you.

entry.title: Upgrading to SAP GUI 800
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

Could you just clarify some questions we have?

  1. Any advantages in using different themes for SAPGUI 800?
  2. Any way to defaulting to using SAP Signature theme instead of the Quartz theme when upgrading to SAP GUI 800?
  3. What are the differences of SAP GUI 760 and SAP GUI 800?

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Upgrading to SAP GUI 800
entry.content:
Hello!

  1. Please consult 2541592 - Display issues when using SAP GUI for Windows with high DPI settings, you'll see that some themes are better equipped to handle high DPI scenarios. Kindly check this KBA and apply the theme which better fits you context.
  2. Kindly consult 3315575 - How to change SAP GUI theme for multiple users. You'll see that theme configuration might be set via Windows registry keys, and in case your users already have a theme set in the registry path, then these theme will remain cross-installation.
  3. Please consult 3075781 - New and changed features in SAP GUI for Windows 8.00 and 2796898 - New and changed features in SAP GUI for Windows 7.70, for a list of changes that SAP GUI went through since 760 version.

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori Elements Feature Showcase App with RAP for Release 2402 - Why is it late?
entry.content:
Nice!

What a pity that I have to wait a year and a half before I can install these features onPrem with ABAP Plattform 2025.

entry.title: Re: How to Enable Multiple Selection Mode in a Data Table...
entry.content: Hi Bill Froelich
